AdminReleaseNotes.heading: Release Notes
AdminReleaseNotes.description: View drafts and published update communications.
AdminReleaseNotes.draftDescription: Save changes as a draft. Drafts are not visible to teachers.
AdminReleaseNotes.contentPlaceholder: Explain the change teachers need to know.
AdminReleaseNotes.publishDescription: After publishing, teachers who have not acknowledged it will receive it automatically. Published Release Notes cannot be edited and this action cannot be undone.
AdminReleaseNotes.publishChecklistClear: The wording is clear and non-technical.
AdminReleaseNotes.publishUnavailable: The Release Note was not found or has already been published.

InstallPrompt.title: Install TahfidzFlow
InstallPrompt.description: Add to home screen for quick access like a regular app.

Dashboard.emptyState: No recent activity yet. Start with today's first hafalan or murojaah record.

Login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
Login.errorRateLimited: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
Login.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.

Students.heading: Santri
Students.description: Monitor memorization, review, and active targets.
Students.emptySearch: No santri match this search. Try a shorter name.
Students.emptyNoStudents: No active santri yet. Add a santri to begin logging progress.
Students.emptyInactiveSearch: No inactive students match this search.
Students.deleteBlockedReason: Cannot delete yet: {items}. Remove records/summative scores or complete/cancel active targets first. To keep history, leave the student inactive.

StudentDetail.accessDeniedDescription: You do not have permission to view this santri.
StudentDetail.accessDeniedHelp: Only the assigned teacher or a system administrator can open this record.
StudentDetail.inactiveArchiveNote: Inactive santri remain archived so learning history stays clean and traceable.
StudentDetail.inactiveOwnerHint: As the supervising teacher, you can reactivate this santri before logging new hafalan or murojaah.
StudentDetail.emptyTargets: No active targets yet. Add a small target to make progress easier to follow.
StudentDetail.emptyActivity: No learning activity yet. Start by logging the first hafalan or murojaah.
StudentDetail.deactivateDescription: Santri will not appear in the active list.

HalaqahLevelDialog.warningMessage: This change will affect {count} students in the same halaqah.

QuickLog.heading: Quick Log
QuickLog.description: Select a santri, fill in hafalan/murojaah data.
QuickLog.selectStudentPrompt: Select a santri first to start logging.

Profile.heading: Profile
Profile.description: Your account summary and current access.
Profile.roleDescriptionAdmin: Has access to view system summaries and manage Tahfidz data.
Profile.roleDescriptionTeacher: Has access to log memorization, review, and monitor assigned santri.
Profile.adminAccessDescription: Open admin panel to view system data summaries.
Profile.actionsDescriptionAdmin: Use this page to navigate to key areas based on your role.
Profile.actionsDescriptionTeacher: Use this page to access main teacher areas and sign out.

InstallApp.manualAndroid: Tap the browser menu (⋮) then select “Add to Home Screen” or “Install App”.
InstallApp.manualDesktop: Click the install icon (↓) in the browser address bar, then click Install.
InstallApp.manualIos: Tap the Share button, then scroll down and select “Add to Home Screen”.

Reports.adminOnlyDescription: Reports are available for teacher accounts.
Reports.heading: Reports
Reports.description: Summary of your halaqah and santri progress.
Reports.gradingLinksDescription: Open the daily formative recap or flexible summative assessments from here.
Reports.formativeDescription: Automatic daily scores from hafalan and murojaah.
Reports.summativeDescription: Flexible per-surah assessments for each student.

AdminDashboard.heading: Admin Panel
AdminDashboard.description: System summary and TahfidzFlow data management.
AdminDashboard.areaGuruDescription: Manage teacher accounts, activation, and access allocation.
AdminDashboard.areaKelasDescription: Set up school classes such as 7A, 8B, and 9C.
AdminDashboard.areaHalaqahDescription: Organize halaqah groups and learning levels.
AdminDashboard.areaSantriDescription: Add santri and link them to teachers, classes, and halaqah.
AdminDashboard.areaLaporanDescription: Progress summary for all teachers and santri.
AdminDashboard.emptyTeachers: No teacher data to display yet.
AdminDashboard.reportsMenuDescription: Manage and monitor all tahfidz data. Select a report type below to view details.

AdminTeachers.heading: Teacher Directory
AdminTeachers.description: Review teacher accounts, student distribution, and access status in one place.
AdminTeachers.searchPlaceholder: Search teacher name, email, or phone number
AdminTeachers.emptyNoData: No teacher data to display yet.

AdminClasses.heading: Academic Classes
AdminClasses.description: Manage school classes and academic years for student placement.
AdminClasses.searchPlaceholder: Search class name or academic year
AdminClasses.emptyNoData: No class data to display yet.

AdminHalaqah.heading: Halaqah
AdminHalaqah.description: Manage halaqah per teacher, per class 7, 8, and 9, including learning levels.

AdminHalaqah.inactiveTeacherWarning: The supervising teacher is inactive. This halaqah may not function optimally.
AdminHalaqah.emptyNoData: No halaqah data to display yet.

StudentForm.title: Add Student
StudentForm.description: Add a new student to your halaqah.
StudentForm.halaqahHelperText: Changing the level will affect all students in this halaqah.
StudentForm.placeholderNotes: Optional, additional notes about the student.
StudentForm.levelLockedHint: Level is determined by your existing halaqah for this grade.

DeactivateStudent.confirmMessage: Deactivate this student from the active list?

StudentFormPage.selectProgramDescription: Choose the program you want to use to add students.
StudentFormPage.programAcademicDescription: Regular tahfidz program with halaqah and academic classes.
StudentFormPage.programBoardingDescription: Intensive tahfidz program with boarding classes.

RecordForm.conversionConfirmDescription: The record will be changed from {source} to {destination}. All data will be moved and preserved.
RecordForm.conversionPendingDescription: Please wait while the record is moved and saved.
RecordForm.placeholderNotes: Optional, e.g.: tajwid mad needs attention.
RecordForm.placeholderNotesMurojaah: Optional, e.g.: verses 7-9 still often mixed up.

TasmiForm.placeholderNotes: Optional, e.g.: tajweed fluent, memorization needs review at verses 15-20.
TasmiForm.deleteConfirm: Tasmi' Juz {juz} record will be permanently deleted.

TargetForm.placeholderNotes: Optional - additional notes about this target

AdminStudentDetail.emptyRecords: No hafalan or murojaah records yet.

ReactivateStudent.confirmMessage: Activate this student back to the active list?

ChangeEmail.heading: Change Email
ChangeEmail.description: Update your login email with current password verification.
ChangeEmail.helper: Use an active email you can access easily. The new address will be used for future sign-ins and account notices.

AdminFormPage.addTeacherDescription: Create a new teacher account for logging hafalan and murojaah.
AdminFormPage.addTeacherPasswordDescription: Minimum 8 characters with letters and numbers. The teacher can change the password later.
AdminFormPage.editTeacherPasswordDescription: Leave blank if you don't want to change the password.
AdminFormPage.addAcademicClassDescription: Create a new academic class for student placement.
AdminFormPage.addBoardingClassDescription: Create a new boarding class for student placement.
AdminFormPage.editBoardingClassDescription: Update boarding class {grade}{section} data for academic year {year}.
AdminFormPage.editAcademicClassDescription: Update class {grade}{section} data for academic year {year}.
AdminFormPage.addHalaqahDescription: Create a new halaqah group for organizing santri.
AdminFormPage.addStudentDescription: Add a new student to the system.

AdminAcademicYear.title: Academic Years
AdminAcademicYear.addYearDescription: Create a new academic year to manage academic data.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmActivateMessage: Activate academic year {year}? Other academic years will be deactivated.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmArchiveMessage: Archive academic year {year}? Data will not be deleted, only hidden from teacher workflow.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmRestoreMessage: Restore academic year {year}? The academic year will become active again.
AdminAcademicYear.cannotArchiveActive: Cannot archive the currently active academic year.
AdminAcademicYear.archivedYearDescription: This academic year has been archived. Data is still available for review and export.
AdminAcademicYear.noStudents: No students in this academic year yet.
AdminAcademicYear.emptyState: No academic years yet. Add the first academic year.
AdminAcademicYear.yearInvalid: Invalid year format. Use YYYY/YYYY format.
AdminAcademicYear.datesRequired: Start date and end date are required.
AdminAcademicYear.startDateBeforeEnd: Start date must be before end date.
AdminAcademicYear.formativeMeetingAutomatic: The timeline grows automatically when Academic Formative activity occurs on a new date.
AdminAcademicYear.formativeMeetingResetSuccess: The formative meeting was reset to Meeting 1.
AdminAcademicYear.formativeMeetingActiveYearRequired: Formative meetings can only be changed for the active academic year.
AdminAcademicYear.noTeachers: No teachers in this academic year yet.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmDeleteStudentMessage: Delete student {name}? All memorization, revision, target, and summative score data will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
AdminAcademicYear.studentNotFoundInYear: Student not found in this academic year.
AdminAcademicYear.cannotDeleteFromActiveYear: Students can only be deleted from archived academic years.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmBulkDeleteMessage: You will delete all students from this academic year along with all related data. This action cannot be undone.
AdminAcademicYear.bulkDeleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have exported the data you need.
AdminAcademicYear.dangerZoneDescription: Actions below cannot be undone. Make sure you have exported all necessary data before proceeding.
AdminAcademicYear.confirmDeleteYearMessage: Permanently delete academic year {year}? Make sure all data has been removed first.
AdminAcademicYear.deleteYearWarning: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the academic year from the system.
AdminAcademicYear.yearStillHasData: Academic year cannot be deleted because it still has data. Remove all students and halaqah first.
AdminAcademicYear.cannotDeleteNonArchivedYear: Only archived academic years can be deleted.
AdminAcademicYear.cannotDeleteActiveYear: Cannot delete the currently active academic year.

AdminTeacherForm.accountActiveDescription: Deactivate to suspend access without deleting data.

AdminClassForm.classNameDescription: The class name is automatically formed from the grade and section combination.

AdminHalaqahForm.halaqahNameAutoDescription: The halaqah name will be taken from the selected teacher's name.

AdminHalaqahForm.halaqahClassDescription: The halaqah will be linked to the academic class for this year.
AdminHalaqahForm.levelLowDescription: New students starting memorization, focusing on short surahs.
AdminHalaqahForm.levelMediumDescription: Students have memorized several juz, beginning intensive review.
AdminHalaqahForm.levelHighDescription: Students have memorized extensively, focusing on tajwid and retention.

AdminStudentForm.boardingClassDescription: The boarding class registered for this academic year.
AdminStudentForm.academicClassDescription: The academic class registered for this academic year.

Validation.teacherEmailRequired: Valid teacher email is required (max 120 characters).
Validation.teacherPhoneTooLong: Phone number must be 30 characters or less.

Validation.teacherCreated: New teacher account has been created.
Validation.teacherHasStudents: Cannot delete {name} - still has {count} registered students. Deactivate the account instead.
Validation.teacherHasClassGroups: Cannot delete {name} - still has {count} registered halaqah. Deactivate the account instead.
Validation.teacherDeleteFailedRelatedData: Failed to delete teacher. There are still related records that must be removed first.
Validation.adminAcademicClassYearMismatch: Academic class must match the selected academic year.
Validation.adminTeacherNoHalaqah: This teacher has no halaqah for {year} Grade {grade}.
Validation.adminStudentHasRelatedData: Cannot delete {name}: still has {items}. Remove records/summative scores or complete/cancel active targets first, or deactivate the student instead.
Validation.halaqahDescTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less.

Validation.halaqahHasAnyStudents: Halaqah "{name}" still has {count} linked students. Move students first.

Validation.classAcademicYearFormat: Academic year must be in YYYY/YYYY format.

Validation.classUpdated: Academic class data has been updated.
Validation.classHasStudents: Class {name} still has {count} active students. Deactivate students first.
Validation.classHasAnyStudents: Class {name} still has {count} linked students. Move students first.
Validation.targetFromGtTo: Start verse cannot be greater than end verse.
Validation.targetEndBeforeStart: Target end date must be after start date.
Validation.summativeSurahNotFound: Summative surah was not found. Please select a surah from the available list.
Validation.summativeDuplicate: A summative score for this surah and semester already exists. Please edit the existing record instead.
Validation.unauthorized: You do not have access to this data.
Validation.passwordLetterNumber: Password must contain at least one letter and one number.

Offline.banner: You are offline. Some features are unavailable.

OfflinePage.heading: Connection lost
OfflinePage.description: This page is not available offline yet. Reconnect your device, then try again.

Formative.heading: Formative Recap
Formative.description: Automatic recap of daily hafalan and murojaah scores without duplicate input.
Formative.studentListDescription: Review daily assessment summaries for each student per semester.
Formative.emptyStudentsHeading: No active students for this recap yet.
Formative.emptyStudentsDescription: Add hafalan or murojaah records first so the formative recap can populate.
Formative.detailDescription: Formative scores come from hafalan and murojaah records. Use each row action to edit or remove the source record.
Formative.emptyRecordsDescription: Log hafalan or murojaah first. The formative recap will fill automatically from daily records.

Summative.heading: Summative Scores
Summative.description: Manage summative assessments flexibly per student and per surah.
Summative.studentListDescription: Open a student detail page to add or edit per-surah assessments.
Summative.emptyStudentsHeading: No active students in this class yet.
Summative.emptyStudentsDescription: Add active students first so summative assessment can begin.
Summative.detailDescription: Per-surah summative assessment history for this semester.
Summative.emptyAssessmentsDescription: Add the first assessment to start building this student's summative history.
Summative.notesPlaceholder: Optional, for example tajwid notes or memorization strength.
Summative.deleteFailed: The summative assessment was not found or has changed. Reload and try again.
Summative.targetInputDescription: Fill all scores or only the completed ones. Blank inputs will be ignored.
Summative.additionalMemorizationDescription: Record additional memorization outside the academic target.
Summative.recommendationSubtext: For target monitoring, not a grading limit.
Summative.deleteDescription: The assessment for {surah} will be permanently removed from this semester.
